news.summary: MIGDAL HAEMEK, Israel - On May 08, 2025, Tower Semiconductor (NASDAQ/TASE: TSEM), a top foundry of high-value analog semiconductor solutions, is set to partake in two significant conferences. The first is the 22nd Annual Craig-Hallum Institutional Investor Conference in Minneapolis on May 28, followed by the 53rd Annual TD Cowen Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in New York on May 29. Investors have the chance to engage in one-on-one meetings with company representatives. For those interested, reaching out to the conference organizers or emailing the investor relations team at towersemi@kcsa.com is advised.
news.headline: Tower Semiconductor to attend 22nd Craig-Hallum and 53rd TD Cowen conferences, May 28-29. Investors can meet with company reps. Contact for more info.

news.summary: Deckhouse Communications has partnered with iO3 to introduce cutting-edge digital solutions to the maritime industry in Turkey. This collaboration will focus on providing innovative technologies to improve efficiency and productivity in the sector. With Deckhouse Communications' expertise in maritime communications and iO3's specialization in digital solutions, this partnership aims to revolutionize the industry. This initiative is anticipated to benefit numerous companies within the Turkish maritime sector, with an estimated impact on over 200 maritime businesses in the region. Through this collaboration, the companies are aiming to enhance operations and communication within the industry, catering to the specific needs and challenges faced by maritime businesses in Turkey.
news.headline: Deckhouse Comm. and iO3 partner to provide digital solutions to Turkish maritime sector, enhancing technology.

news.summary: Fredrick Scuteri has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer of Muriel Siebert & Co., the broker-dealer subsidiary of Siebert Financial Corp. This move signifies a strategic decision by the company to enhance its executive leadership team. Scuteri's role will involve overseeing operational functions within the subsidiary, bringing in his extensive experience and expertise to drive growth and efficiency. This development underscores Siebert Financial Corp.'s commitment to strengthening its management structure to further its business objectives.
news.headline: Siebert Financial Corp appoints Fredrick Scuteri as COO of broker-dealer subsidiary Muriel Siebert & Co.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: HTB) based in Asheville, North Carolina, declared that its subsidiary, HomeTrust Bank, was acknowledged as one of Forbes’ America’s Best Banks for 2025 and ranked in the Top 50 Community Banks in the 2024 S&P Global Market Intelligence annual report. The recognitions were granted for the Bank's strong financial performance, with metrics evaluating its overall stability and prosperity. This marks the second consecutive year that HomeTrust has received accolades in both publications, showcasing its continued excellence in the banking sector.
news.headline: HomeTrust Bank recognized as Forbes’ America’s Best Banks for 2025 and Top 50 Community Bank in 2024. Second year recognized.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Menlo Park, California, Runway Growth Finance Corp. (Nasdaq: RWAY), a prominent firm offering flexible capital to late- and growth-stage companies, revealed a regular cash distribution for the second quarter of 2025. The Board of Directors approved a distribution of $0.33 per share, along with a supplemental dividend of $0.02 per share for the same period. This move signifies the company's commitment to supporting companies with alternative funding options to equity raising.
news.headline: Runway Growth Finance Corp. declares $0.33 regular dividend and $0.02 supplemental distribution for Q2 2025.

news.summary: The global precision medicine market was valued at US$132.46 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 11.1%, reaching US$145.53 billion in 2024 and an impressive US$246.66 billion by 2029. Factors like integrating AI and ML for precision diagnostics, collaborations between pharmaceutical and diagnostics companies, and the rise in direct-to-consumer testing are driving market growth. Major players are expanding geographically and establishing facilities in emerging economies. The market is segmented by product into inhibitor drugs, monoclonal antibodies, cell and gene therapy, antiviral/anti-retroviral drugs, and other therapeutic products. Monoclonal antibodies dominate due to approvals for precision therapies, especially in oncology, which accounts for the largest share of the precision diagnostics market by indication. North America leads the precision diagnostics market, followed by Europe, while Asia Pacific shows the highest CAGR growth.
news.headline: Global precision medicine market valued at $132.46 billion in 2023, forecasted to reach $246.66 billion by 2029, with 11.1% CAGR growth. Major drivers include AI and ML integration, collaborations between pharmaceutical and diagnostics companies, and rise in direct-to-consumer testing. Monoclonal antibodies dominate the market based on product. Oncology segment is largest in precision diagnostics market. North America leading, with Asia Pacific showing highest CAGR growth.

news.summary: A report titled "Smart Lock Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global smart lock market is projected to achieve a value of US$11.77 billion by 2033, showing a significant increase from its value of US$2.64 billion in 2024. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.05% expected to transpire between 2025 and 2033. Factors contributing to this expansion include escalating safety apprehensions, rising public recognition of the benefits of smart lock systems, enhanced integration with smart home setups on a global scale, and continual advancements in technology.
news.headline: Global Smart Lock Market to reach US$11.77 Billion by 2033 from US$2.64 Billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 18.05% between 2025-2033.

news.summary: Adtran revealed today that eCommunity™ Fiber has chosen its fiber access platform to support Morrow's smart city project. The platform will deliver high-speed internet to the city, catering to municipal needs, local businesses, and residents. This move will allow for advanced public safety services and prepare the city for future broadband requirements. Through Adtran’s technology, eCommunity™ Fiber aims to establish a secure and adaptable broadband network for the city’s populace.
news.headline: eCommunity™ Fiber partners with Adtran to boost City of Morrow's smart city project, providing high-speed connectivity.

news.summary: A leading protective DNS provider warns travel planners to exercise caution due to a surge in vacation-related internet traffic. On May 8, 2025, DNSFilter released new data revealing an increase in fraud risks for consumers while accessing its DNS content filtering and threat blocking platform. The findings highlight the growing concerns surrounding cyber threats in the travel sector.
news.headline: DNSFilter Research finds sharp increase in fake travel sites, warns of fraud risks ahead of summer. Data collected shows spike in vacation-related traffic. Washington, May 8, 2025.

news.summary: The city of Portland in Oregon witnessed a significant announcement on May 8, 2025, as WebMD Health Services disclosed a fresh collaboration with Torchlight Parenting & Caregiving, a division of LifeSpeak Inc. This partnership with the well-known caregiver support services provider aims to provide enhanced support to employers and their workforce. This partnership combines the expertise and resources of both companies to offer comprehensive solutions to employers, caregivers, and employees.
news.headline: WebMD Health Services partners with Torchlight to enhance employee well-being & caregiving support, empowering employers.

news.summary: Fifteen individuals received treatment in four increasing dose levels of TTX-MC138, with no notable safety concerns or toxicities that restrict dosage reported. Currently, ten patients are still participating in the study without any signs of disease advancement. Post dosing, analysis showed miR-10b target engagement at the 24-hour mark. The event took place in Boston in May.
news.headline: TransCode Therapeutics finishes Phase 1a trial cohort 4 with no toxicities, 15 patients treated, 10 remain, miR-10b target engagement shown.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in San Francisco, Thunderbit introduced a specialized vertical AI agent for business users aiming to efficiently extract structured data from the web. This new AI-powered web data extraction platform offers smarter and quicker capabilities, catering to the needs of users looking for enhanced accessibility.
news.headline: New AI web data extraction agent launched by Thunderbit for business users; aims to provide faster and smarter data extraction.

news.summary: More than 9,000 drones illuminated the night sky above Yas Island to mark the historic unveiling of the Middle East's inaugural Disney theme park resort destination. Renowned figures such as Tyrese Gibson, Naomi Campbell, Nancy Ajram, Chiara Ferragni, and Ed Westwick participated in the festivities on Wednesday.
news.headline: Yas Island celebrates Disney theme park announcement with 9,000 drones, global celebrities, and a spectacular event.

news.summary: Arlo Technologies, Inc., based in San Jose, California, recently emerged as a top player in the public SaaS industry globally. The company's rapid pace of innovation has surpassed that of its competitors, allowing it to secure a leading position in the market. On May 8, 2025, Arlo Technologies, Inc. made an announcement where they detailed their accomplishments. As a major player in the smart home security sector, Arlo Technologies, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ARLO.
news.headline: Arlo hits milestone with over 5M paid subs, generating annual revenue of $275M, surpassing competitors globally.

news.summary: In Worcester, Massachusetts on May 8, 2025, Greenwood Industries and its affiliate TWC Phoenix, leaders in commercial roofing and custom building envelope solutions in the Northeast, have formed an investment partnership with Dunes Point Capital. This collaboration signifies an important move for the companies, showcasing their commitment to growth and innovation in the market. The agreement brings together significant resources and expertise to further strengthen their position in the industry.
news.headline: Greenwood Industries partners with TWC Phoenix and Dunes Point Capital to grow leading commercial roofing company in Northeast.

news.summary: A recent study conducted in Berkeley Heights, N.J. on May 8, 2025, unveiled a notable trend of heightened automation and trust in NBA programs within prominent U.S. life sciences companies. Axtria Inc., a pioneering AI-driven data analytics firm reshaping the field of life sciences, reported a surge in the adoption of dynamic targeting strategies. This development signifies a significant shift towards leveraging innovative technologies within the industry.
news.headline: New study by Axtria Inc. shows 3 key trends in customer engagement for U.S. life sciences: automation increasing, trust in NBA programs, and dynamic targeting adoption.

news.summary: Bill Gates announces ambitious objectives on the 25th anniversary of his foundation, revealing plans to donate most of his resources and accelerate spend-down by 2045. This decision marks a significant milestone for the Gates Foundation, with the announcement made on May 8, 2025, in Seattle.
news.headline: Gates Foundation to double spending over next 20 years, aiming to save and improve lives by 2045.

news.summary: A cutting-edge platform has positioned a company at the crossroads of healthcare and emerging technology markets in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., with the announcement made on May 8, 2025. SurgiBox Inc., a leader in healthcare innovations, revealed the acquisition of a new US patent for its revolutionary blockchain-powered data system.
news.headline: SurgiBox Inc. secures US patent for medical blockchain tech, paving way for AI applications. Revolutionary platform in healthcare & tech markets.

news.summary: ICEYE is enhancing its emphasis on space-based defense technology through a new joint venture. The collaboration between Rheinmetall and ICEYE is deepening, with both companies working closely together to develop advanced SAR satellite technology. This partnership, announced in Helsinki and Dusseldorf on May 8, 2025, signifies a significant step towards strengthening their capabilities in this sector. ICEYE, a prominent manufacturer in the field, and Rheinmetall are coming together to innovate and advance their presence.
news.headline: Rheinmetall and ICEYE to establish joint venture in Rheinmetall Space Cluster for satellite production. Strengthening defense technology focus.

news.summary: A major collaboration was unveiled on May 8, 2025 in New York City between ITN, a prominent player in automated activation technology for local TV, and Magnite (NASDAQ: MGNI), the leading independent sell-side advertising company. This groundbreaking partnership aims to revolutionize the process of executing local TV advertising. With Magnite's stature as the largest independent sell-side advertising company and ITN's expertise in automated activation technology for local TV, this collaboration is poised to significantly transform the landscape of local TV advertising in the near future.
news.headline: ITN & Magnite team up for programmatic solution in US local TV advertising. Key: ITN - leader in local TV tech, Magnite - ad giant.

news.summary: Diatonic Healthcare, a middle market private equity firm specializing in healthcare technology and tech-enabled services, announced on May 8, 2025, its plans to utilize the proceeds for enhancing innovations and speeding up client offerings. The company will also allocate funds towards sponsoring future acquisitions.
news.headline: Diatonic Healthcare invests in Quantix to improve client offerings and sponsor acquisitions. MIAMI, May 8, 2025.

news.summary: In a move set to bolster governance and facilitate global growth, a notable South Korean company, Tire Bank Group, has recently finalized the acquisition of a majority ownership stake in Air Premia. Air Premia, renowned as Korea's pioneering hybrid airline for long-haul flights, is overseen by CEO Kim Jae-hyun and Yoo Myung-sub. This significant transaction, accomplished on May 8, 2025, signifies a pivotal step for Air Premia's strategic development, underscoring the company's ambitions for global expansion and operational enhancements.
news.headline: Tire Bank Group buys controlling stake in Air Premia, leading hybrid airline in Korea for global expansion.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve decided to maintain interest rates at 4.25%-4.5% despite pressure for a decrease. Analyst Louis Navellier predicts the Fed will be one of the last central banks to cut rates, with expectations of four cuts this year. Other central banks like the Bank of England are cutting rates, prompting Navellier to believe that money will flow back to America due to higher rates. Navellier also noted progress in U.S.-China trade tensions. The Bank of England did cut its rates to 4.25% as expected. Navellier's full insights can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Federal Reserve holds rates at 4.25%-4.5% despite pressure. Expert predicts 4 cuts this year, citing global rate collapse. Fed expected to be last to cut.

news.summary: In Riverwoods, Illinois, Diners Club International® revealed a generous contribution to World Central Kitchen by donating $750,000. This donation aims to support communities affected by natural disasters and humanitarian crises globally. On May 7, 2025, for each transaction using a Diners Club card worldwide, the company pledged to provide one meal, with a cap of $750,000. Diners Club Members globally successfully reached the maximum donation limit, showcasing a fruitful donation initiative. The $750,000 donation from Diners Club to World Central Kitchen will play a crucial role in providing aid.
news.headline: Diners Club International® donates $750,000 to World Central Kitchen for disaster relief, funded through purchases on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: Atlanta-based restaurant chain, Huddle House, is revamping its brand to enhance customer experience. With James O’Reilly as CEO and Blain Shortreed as COO, the company is introducing a new brand identity after conducting extensive guest research. The move comes after 60 years of serving freshly prepared, home-style dishes. The reimagined brand will focus on improving core product quality and menu innovation. This transformation aims to cater better to its loyal customers and adapt to changing consumer preferences.
news.headline: Huddle House is renovating its brand to cater to new guests, focusing on new menu items and brand identity.

news.summary: A report on the Saudi Arabia Milk Powder market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, indicating significant growth trends. The market is projected to increase from US$401.4 million in 2024 to US$699.17 million by 2033, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.36% during the period from 2025 to 2033. This growth is attributed to factors such as rising demand for infant formula, expanding retail channels, governmental support for food security, heightened health awareness, and evolving consumer preferences.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia's milk powder market to reach $699.17 million by 2033 from $401.4 million in 2024, with 6.36% CAGR. Growth driven by infant formula demand, retail expansion, and health awareness.

news.summary: After several weeks of negotiations, President Trump has praised the completion of a comprehensive trade agreement between the United States and the United Kingdom. The deal is expected to significantly benefit the UK economy, with projected trade numbers exceeding $200 billion annually. This development comes as a positive step for UK Prime Minister Starmer and marks a significant milestone in strengthening diplomatic and economic ties between the two nations.
news.headline: Trump praises 'full' US-UK trade deal, boosting Starmer post weeks of talks. - Source withholds details.

news.summary: Ether (ETH) is on the rise, breaking a downtrend since December to target $3,000. Ethereum's total value locked (TVL) has surged by 41% to $52.8 billion in 30 days, with daily transactions rising by 22% to 1.34 million, signaling a strong network recovery. ETH faces resistance at $2,100-$2,800 but is set to recover towards $3,000, backed by increasing network activity and positive technical indicators. Analysts predict a bullish reversal for ETH, targeting $2,500-$3,500. However, low transaction activity and net outflows in Ether ETFs may hamper the quick rise to $3,000. Readers are advised to conduct their research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: ETH price breaks downtrend, aiming for $3K. TVL up 41% to $52.8B in 30 days, daily transactions at 1.34M. Resistance at $2,100-$2,800.

news.summary: A recent report on the Spain Application Security Market reveals promising growth prospects, with an anticipated annual increase of 17.5%. By 2025, the market size is estimated to reach USD 601.4 million. Between 2020 and 2024, the sector displayed a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 1%. The report provides insights into market opportunities, future dynamics, expenditure analysis based on industry, security type, deployment methods, and enterprise sizes. This information has been made available through ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.headline: Spain's application security market set to reach $601.4 million by 2025, growing at 17.5% annually. Business opportunities increasing.

news.summary: In a recent webinar hosted in Needham, Massachusetts, IDC discussed the repercussions of tariffs on the economy and global supply chain adjustments. The webinar also covered the revised global IT spending forecast. The webinar highlighted the importance of understanding the economic impact of tariffs, with experts shedding light on the shifts in global supply chains. This insightful session provided key insights into the State of the Market, emphasizing the need to adapt to the changing landscape of global trade.
news.headline: IDC downgrades global IT spending forecast due to tariff uncertainty, now predicts growth between +5% and +9%.

news.summary: Dallas-based Sonida Senior Living, Inc. (NYSE: SNDA), a prominent senior living communities owner, operator, and investor, revealed today the participation of key executives in upcoming investor conferences. Brandon Ribar, the President & CEO, Kevin Detz, the CFO, and Max Levy, the CIO, will engage at the 2025 BMO North American Real Estate Conference in New York City. The event will include one-on-one meetings with Sonida management.
news.headline: Sonida Senior Living will participate in the 2025 BMO North American Real Estate Conference in NYC. CEO, CFO, and CIO will represent.
